rationale: No-regression check on the whole spec 115 diff (origin/main..21374bb8, internal/ 11 files). (1) FindOrphanedClosedBeads is a thin fail-open wrapper over the new ScanOrphanedClosedBeads core: it discards the error exactly as before, and the ancestry-error-skip-continue behavior is unchanged (old code already skipped a single bad bead and kept scanning the same for-loop) — byte-identical for complete/next/doctor (3 confirmed callers). (2) reconcilePendingRefutations now delegates to the shared uncoveredPendingObligations core; panel_advisory_test.go diff is purely additive (all edits after line 362, no existing test touched) and the new present-but-null / per-element shape checks were explicitly reviewed and sanctioned across bead-1's 4-round 8/8 panel (consolidated-round-4.md: 'reconcile byte-identical on valid inputs'). (3) executor diff is comment-only, confirmed. (4) internal/gitutil is byte-unchanged (0-diff). impl_test.go edits (writePlanWithBeads fixtures, open->closed payload, NoCommitsNoBeads message, DocSyncWarning override) all trace to bead-2's consolidated-round-1.md 'Deviations A-E ruled legitimate' (C is a spec-mandated tightening). All required packages pass: go test -count=1 ./internal/complete ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/executor ./internal/approve ./internal/doctor ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/setup ./internal/validate — all ok. gofmt/vet clean on touched packages. Worktree clean (only reviewers' own untracked scratch dir present).
